---
title: "Nicolay Vallee"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: assets/profile.jpg
  image-shape: round
  links:
      href: https://github.com/dittbrukernavn
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/dittnavn
    - icon: envelope
      text: E-post
      href: nicolay@vallee.no
---

I am Master of Science in Business Administration - Major Business Analytics student with expected graduation in June 2026.

My main interests are quantitative finance, machine learning and econometrics.

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
Looking for roles within quantitative finance / financial research in Oslo.
:::
